data_source.name: Star Citizen Wiki API
data_source.note: Complete rebuild from this single source. No other sources mixed in. UEX price data is embedded in the API responses.

key_changes_in_48: Damage Deflection Threshold system (armor meta overhaul)

data_quality.spot_check_validation: 3 ships + 3 weapons verified against live API — all values match exactly

notes: v2.0 — Complete single-source rebuild replacing v1.0 multi-source data. Armor stored as damage multipliers (not percentages). Penetration stored as base_distance (raw API value).
